386053000.label: Evaluation procedure
synonyms: Determination of a value, conclusion, or inference by evaluating evidence

609328004.label: Allergic disposition
synonyms: The disposition to develop an allergic reaction.

A propensity to developing a pathological immune process generally directed towards a foreign antigen, which results in tissue injury. It is most often applied to type I hypersensitivity but other hypersensitivity types especially type IV (e.g. allergic contact dermatitis) may be involved. Revised nomenclature for allergy for global use:Report of the Nomenclature Review Committee of the World Allergy Organization, October 2003.

609433001.label: Hypersensitivity disposition
synonyms: A propensity to developing an adverse reaction upon exposure to an agent at a dose otherwise tolerated by normal individuals. Revised nomenclature for allergy for global use:Report of the Nomenclature Review Committee of the World Allergy Organization, October 2003.
The disposition to develop an allergic or pseudoallergic reaction.

473010000.label: Hypersensitivity condition
synonyms: The disposition to develop an allergic or pseudoallergic reaction, the reaction itself or its consequences.
The disposition to develop hypersensitivity or the manifestation of such a disposition.

473011001.label: Allergic condition
synonyms: The disposition to develop an allergic reaction, the allergic reaction itself or its consequences.

282260003.label: Activity of daily living procedures and interventions
synonyms: Activity of daily living procedures and interventions (procedure)

308335008.label: Patient encounter procedure
synonyms: An interaction between a patient and a healthcare provider for the purpose of the provision of healthcare services to the patient.
